Scaler.fee: Approximately INR 17 lakh total for the UG program.
Scaler.scholarships: Merit-based (JEE, BITSAT, SAT, sports) and Need-based scholarships.
Scaler.placements: 100% placement assistance, mandatory internship, recruiters include Google, Microsoft, Amazon.
Scaler.selection criteria: National Scholarship & Entrance Test (NSET), followed by an interview.
Scaler.highlights: Located in Bangalore, 10-acre campus, focus on practical learning.

NST.fee: INR 23.25 Lakhs to INR 24.4 Lakhs for 4 years.
NST.scholarships: JEE Excellence (100%), Merit-based, Young Women Leader, Extraordinary Achievement.
NST.placements: Strong industry focus, 2500+ hiring companies, paid internships early on.
NST.selection criteria: Newton School Admission Test (NSAT) and interview.
NST.highlights: Partners with Rishihood, Ajeenkya DY Patil, and S-VYASA Universities. 1:1 mentorship.

Vedam.scholarships: Merit-Based (up to 100%), Women in Tech (up to 20%), Need-Based (up to 30%).
Vedam.placements: New institute (est. 2025) so no historical data, but emphasizes 6-month paid internships.
Vedam.selection criteria: Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test (VSAT) and personal interview.
Vedam.highlights: New-age tech college, coding from day one, mentored by ex-Google/Microsoft professionals.

NIAT.fee: Ranges from INR 8 lakh to INR 18 lakh depending on partner university.
NIAT.scholarships: Up to 100% merit-based on the upskilling program fees based on NAT.
NIAT.placements: Placement and career support provided, strong NxtWave hiring network.
NIAT.selection criteria: Partner university admission + NxtWave Assessment Test (NAT) & counseling.
NIAT.highlights: Upskilling program integrated with UGC-recognized partner universities.
